description: Modulation → pitch.semitones. A stepped bipolar LFO modulates the pitch of a sustained tonal synth; the strongest spectral peak (fundamental) must move across the render. Proves the pitch modulation write-back path (vibrato). Un-modulated peak range is ~35 Hz; modulated is ~3200 Hz — threshold 1000 Hz sits well clear of both.

assertions.name: audio_present
assertions.comment: the tonal synth must be sounding so it has a fundamental to shift

assertions.name: pitch_moves
assertions.comment: vibrato sweeps the fundamental >1 kHz; un-modulated baseline is ~35 Hz
